systems.name: Invoice Processing Agent
systems.description: Monitors Gmail for incoming invoices, extracts data using GPT-4o Vision, and syncs with QuickBooks Desktop via Conductor.is. Includes a review dashboard and Slack notifications.
benefits: No more manual data entry
Invoices processed within seconds
Automatic sync with bookkeeping
Review dashboard for the office manager
problems: Time-consuming manual invoice processing
Errors from retyping data
Delays in the accounting workflow
No overview of outstanding invoices

systems.name: Call Recording & Transcription
systems.description: Monitors Gmail for voicemail messages, merges WAV files, transcribes via Whisper, generates summaries, and uploads to Google Drive and GHL CRM.
benefits: Automatic transcription of all voicemails
Structured summaries per conversation
Stored directly in CRM and Drive
Never miss a message again
problems: Voicemails that go unlistened
No text archive of conversations
Manually logging call notes in the CRM

systems.name: Lead Qualification Bot
systems.description: Automatically qualifies incoming leads via an AI conversation. Updates the CRM and sends a summary to the sales rep.
benefits: 24/7 automatic lead qualification
Sales rep receives a ready-made summary
Higher conversion through fast follow-up
CRM always up to date
problems: Slow follow-up on incoming leads
Sales reps wasting time on unqualified leads
Inconsistent lead data in the CRM

systems.name: LinkedIn Content Agent
systems.description: Generates weekly LinkedIn posts based on news articles and your writing style. Sends for review in Slack before publishing.
benefits: Consistent weekly content output
Posts written in your own voice
Review step via Slack before publishing
Saves multiple hours every week
problems: No time for consistent content creation
Inconsistent presence on LinkedIn
Blank-page problem when writing

systems.name: Weekly KPI Report
systems.description: Pulls data from CRM, Sheets, and ad platforms, builds a PDF report, and sends it automatically every Monday.
benefits: Weekly report with zero manual effort
All KPIs combined in one overview
Always in the inbox on Monday
Easy to share with clients or team
problems: Hours spent manually building reports
Data scattered across multiple platforms
Inconsistent reporting frequency

systems.name: test
benefits: e
problems: e

systems.name: Instant Onboarding System
systems.description: A fully automated onboarding system that triggers the moment a new client is closed. By filling out a single onboarding form and hitting submit, the entire onboarding sequence runs hands-free: the CRM is updated, a contract is sent, the client receives a welcome email, a communication channel is set up, and all client data including a full receivables schedule is logged.
benefits: Your entire onboarding process runs automatically from a single form submission
New clients receive a contract and welcome email within minutes of closing
All client data lands in your database
Nothing falls through the cracks, every step of onboarding is accounted for and logged
problems: Onboarding a new client involves too many manual steps
CRM records are incomplete or filled in late
Contracts get sent late or forgotten
Confused clients asking for documents, access, and next steps

systems.name: Email Categorization System
systems.description: An AI-powered automation that categorizes incoming emails in real time based on custom labels like business inquiries, invoices, or sales pitches. The moment an email lands in your inbox, the system automatically sorts it into the right category, keeping your inbox empty and letting you decide when to deal with what.
benefits: Your inbox stays empty at all times, free from noise and clutter
Important emails like business inquiries never get buried again
Urgent messages are instantly accessible without scrolling through irrelevant emails
problems: Inbox fills up throughout the day
No clear overview of what is urgent
Important messages get lost in the noise
Manual sorting takes too much time

systems.name: AI Proposal Generator
systems.description: An AI-powered automation that generates a fully branded, client-ready proposal in minutes. By filling out a single form with call notes, problem details, proposed solution, timeline, and pricing, the system uses AI to write the proposal copy, extract milestones, build a pricing table, and populate a personalized proposal or quote template ready to review and send.
benefits: Save hours on drafting custom proposals
No more starting from a blank page, just fill in the form and the system handles the rest
Built-in e-signing means the client can sign directly from the document without any extra steps
Automated follow-ups to make sure the client signs the agreement
problems: Writing proposals takes too much time
Client details have to be manually copy-pasted into documents
No consistent follow-up process after sending proposals
Proposals lack structure or miss key sections
